---
title: "06_analysis"
author: "Vinci Chan"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc_expand: true
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# 1. Setup

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(here)

source("R/config.R")
```

# 2. Data Import

```{r}
holdext_clean_path <- file.path(cfg$derived_dir, "holdext_clean_parquet")
holdext_clean <- open_dataset(holdext_clean_path)
```

# 3. Data Analysis

## 3.1. Manager selection

```{r}
# cik/rquarter panel
returns_by_fund <- holdext_clean %>%
  to_duckdb() %>%
  group_by(cik, rquarter) %>%
  summarise(
    total_value = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_holdings = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  collect() %>% 
  arrange(cik, rquarter) %>%
  group_by(cik) %>%
  mutate(
    prev_value = lag(total_value),
    quarterly_return = (total_value - prev_value) / prev_value
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Calculate performance metrics by fund
fund_metrics <- returns_by_fund %>%
  group_by(cik) %>%
  filter(n() >= 2) %>% 
  summarise(
    n_quarters = n(),
    mean_holdings = mean(n_holdings, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_return = mean(quarterly_return, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_return = sd(quarterly_return, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_return = min(quarterly_return, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_return = max(quarterly_return, na.rm = TRUE),
    # Sharpe ratio (assuming risk-free rate of 0 for simplicity)
    sharpe_ratio = mean_return / sd_return,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(sharpe_ratio))
```
```{r}
# Calibrate n_holdings and n_quarters
fund_metrics %>% 
  summarise(
    funds_total = n(),
    mean_holdings = mean(mean_holdings, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_holdings = median(mean_holdings, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_quarters = mean(n_quarters),
    median_uarters = median(n_quarters)
  )

bind_rows(
  tibble(threshold = "≥5 holdings, ≥2yr", 
         n = nrow(fund_metrics %>% filter(mean_holdings >= 5, n_quarters >= 8))),
  tibble(threshold = "≥10 holdings, ≥2yr", 
         n = nrow(fund_metrics %>% filter(mean_holdings >= 10, n_quarters >= 8))),
  tibble(threshold = "≥20 holdings, ≥3yr", 
         n = nrow(fund_metrics %>% filter(mean_holdings >= 20, n_quarters >= 12))),
  tibble(threshold = "≥30 holdings, ≥4yr", 
         n = nrow(fund_metrics %>% filter(mean_holdings >= 30, n_quarters >= 16)))
)
```

Recommendation: 

Using 5 holdings and 2 years of history as the threshold would maximise sample size but include smaller/newer funds. Which is best for early-stage manager discovery and institutional investors that are more comfortable with higher volatility.

```{r}
fund_metrics_filtered <- fund_metrics %>% 
  filter(
    mean_holdings >= 5,
    n_quarters >= 2*4
  ) %>% 
  arrange(desc(sharpe_ratio))

top_5 <- fund_metrics_filtered %>% head(5)

returns_by_fund %>% 
  filter(cik %in% top_5$cik) %>% 
  print(n = 50)

holdext_clean %>% to_duckdb() %>% glimpse()
```
